scripts.build:web: expo export -p web && node scripts/obfuscate-bundle.js && node scripts/prepare-static-routes.js
scripts.build:android: mkdir -p android/app/src/main/assets && npx expo export:embed --platform android --dev false --entry-file node_modules/expo/AppEntry.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd .. && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk solar-merge-release.apk && echo 'APK ready: solar-merge-release.apk'
